name: Bioline Kitten Shampoo 200ml
shortDescription: Bioline Kitten Shampoo has a deep nourishing formula which adds nutrients for easily damaged or sensitive fur. Bioline Kitten Shampoo will make your kittens fur shiny and healthy.
description: This shampoo has a deep nourishing formula which adds nutrients for easily damaged or sensitive fur. Bioline Kitten Shampoo will make your kittens fur shiny and healthy. Usage: Wet cat thoroughly with normal or warm water. Use appropriate quantity of shampoo, rub into coat until a luxurious lather is built up. Rinse thoroughly till the lather is washed completely. Dry the coat with towel/electric dryer. Note: This product is not edible. Keep out of reach of Children. Sealed after use. Store it in a cool and dry place.
